name: Walter Reis
descp: 25+ years of diverse experience across leading enterprise organizations, with extensive domain knowledge in Business Intelligence, analytics solution architecture, and data platform design. Walter serves as Chief Technology Officer at Iseyon Analytics, overseeing technical strategy and platform innovation. He has architected enterprise BI ecosystems using Tableau, Power BI, SQL Server, and Snowflake for Fortune 500 organizations, delivering measurable outcomes aligned with each client's strategic goals.
